headline: FedEx Completes Spin-Off of FedEx Freight
summary: MEMPHIS, Tenn., June 01, 2026--FedEx Corp. (NYSE: FDX, "FedEx") today announced the completion of its spin-off of FedEx Freight Holding Company, Inc. (NYSE: FDXF, "FedEx Freight"), establishing FedEx Freight as an independent, publicly traded company and focused leader in the North American less-than-truckload (LTL) industry. FedEx Freight common stock will begin "regular way" trading today on the New York Stock Exchange ("NYSE") under the ticker symbol "FDXF." FedEx will continue to trade on th

headline: FedEx Freight Starts Trading Today. It Has Potential.
summary: Instead, FedEx’s spinoff—FedEx Freight trades under the symbol FDXF—is complete.  FedEx was at $333 in late-morning trading, down about 1% from its Friday close north of $411.  FedEx Freight shares were trading for $164, up about 2.5% from its late Friday price of about $160.

headline: FedEx Freight Spin Off Prompts Fresh Look At FedEx Valuation
summary: FedEx has completed the spin-off of FedEx Freight as an independent, publicly traded company focused on the North American LTL sector. The transaction separates FedEx's core parcel and express operations from its LTL freight business into two distinct listed companies. For investors watching NYSE:FDX, this move comes with the stock trading at $411.75 and showing a 40.5% return year to date and 93.2% over the past year. The separation of FedEx Freight puts more attention on the remaining...

headline: FedEx trucking hub expansion in Netherlands aids new air cargo strategy
summary: FedEx is investing $54 million to add capacity at its Netherlands trucking hub to keep up with growing transport demand in Europe and enable easier connections to its air cargo network. The post FedEx trucking hub expansion in Netherlands aids new air cargo strategy appeared first on FreightWaves.
